title: My Project
content:
Build a lightweight task management tool that lets small teams coordinate work
without the overhead of enterprise project software.

**Problem:** Existing tools are either too complex or too limited.

title: VISION
content:
Build a lightweight task management tool that lets small teams coordinate work
without the overhead of enterprise project software.

**Problem:** Existing tools are either too complex or too limited.
**Goal:** A focused app that handles the 80% of project coordination needs.
**Success:** Teams compl

title: CONTEXT
content:
**Audience:** Small software teams (2–10 people).
**Constraints:** Must run as a single-page app; no server-side rendering required.
**Stack:** TypeScript, React, Vite, SQLite (via Tauri for desktop builds).
**Environment:** macOS and Windows primary, Linux community-supported.

title: STRUCTURE
content:
## Architecture

Single-page application with a local-first data layer backed by SQLite.
Syncing is optional and handled via a lightweight REST adapter.

```
src/
  components/   — UI layer (React)
  store/        — State management (Zustand)
  db/           — SQLite access layer (Tauri plugin)
  ap
```

title: STRUCTURE > Key Design Decisions
content:
- Local-first: the app works fully offline; sync is additive.
- No authentication in v1 — single user per device.
- Tasks are the primary entity; projects group tasks.

title: PLAN
content:
## Phase 1 — Foundation (weeks 1–2)
Set up repo, build system, SQLite schema, and basic CRUD.

## Phase 2 — Core UI (weeks 3–5)
Task list view, create/edit/delete flows, drag-and-drop reorder.

## Phase 3 — Sync (weeks 6–8)
Optional REST sync adapter, conflict resolution (last-write-wins).

## Phase

title: PLAN > Phase 3 — Sync (weeks 6–8)

title: PLAN > Phase 4 — Polish & Release (weeks 9–10)
content: Keyboard shortcuts, dark mode, packaging, release notes.
